positive: A mesmerizing, highly stylized celestial forest scene. The composition features bioluminescent flora and graceful, swirling cosmic elements woven through ancient, stylized trees. The central focus is a vibrant, crescent nebula forming the background, framed by delicate, crystalline branches. Use a deep indigo and turquoise color palette contrasted with glowing neon magenta and electric teal highlights. The style should be a blend of psychedelic botanical illustration and Art Deco linework, ensuring crisp, defined silhouettes suitable for apparel printing. Overhead soft lighting emphasizes glow and contrast. Central, symmetrical composition.
